agent_outputs.raw: The mortality comparison is confounded by three factors that individually would require investigation and together make the attribution to the model implausible without a controlled comparison. Seasonal case-mix differences between winter and summer ED populations, concurrent antibiotic protocol update and surge unit opening, and lactate ordering criterion sensitivity to clinician behavior changes. A prior-year same-season comparison or concurrent control ED analysis is the minimum required to support the conclusion. Critique wins.

Three confounds prevent causal attribution: seasonal case-mix, concurrent care protocol changes, and the lactate ordering cohort selection problem. The antibiotic protocol update is especially important — empiric antibiotic guidance is one of the most impactful sepsis mortality interventions known. Dismissing it as 'background' without controlling for it is methodologically unsound. Critique wins.

The before-after mortality comparison cannot establish that the sepsis model improved care. Seasonal population differences, simultaneous antibiotic protocol changes, and selection bias in the lactate ordering cohort are all uncontrolled. The model's prediction accuracy is separately validated but this does not establish downstream outcome impact. Controlled evaluation required. Critique wins.

synthesis: Unanimous critique_wins. The antibiotic protocol concurrent change is consistently cited as a particularly strong alternative explanation. All three agents independently reach the same conclusion with identical issue identification.

etd_constraint.condition: Prior-year same-season comparison; concurrent control ED with antibiotic protocol but without model alert
etd_constraint.supports_critique_if: Prior-year November-December mortality comparable to model-active period; concurrent control EDs with antibiotic protocol show similar improvement without model
etd_constraint.supports_defense_if: Model-active EDs show lower mortality than concurrent same-season same-protocol controls
etd_constraint.ambiguous_if: Some improvement in model EDs beyond control but confounds partially explain the residual effect

all_issues_raised: Concurrent care protocol changes (all three agents)
Lactate ordering cohort selection (all three agents)
